response:
# Earthquake Report

A magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck near Tokyo, Japan on March 15, 2024, at 14:23 UTC, with its epicenter located at coordinates 35.6N 139.7E at a depth of 15 kilometers. The powerful quake triggered a tsunami warning and affected approximately 2.3 million people, resulting in 12 confirmed casualties and an estimated $4.5 billion in damage. Emergency response teams were immediately mobilized to assist affected communities and assess the full extent of the disaster.
